requirement_topic.en: Scope & Classification — Occupational Filtering Respirator (KEBS PVoC) vs Medical or Surgical Mask (PPB)
requirement_topic.zh: 范围与分类——职业防尘口罩（KEBS PVoC）与医用/外科口罩（PPB）
requirement_topic.zht: 範圍與分類——職業防塵口罩（KEBS PVoC）與醫用/外科口罩（PPB）

summary.en: Regulatory scope in Kenya is determined by intended use claim. A filtering respirator that protects the wearer against airborne particles for occupational safety is a KEBS-controlled product in the PVoC system and is tested to the Kenya Standard (KS) adopting EN 149. Medical masks and surgical masks with patient infection-control or clinical claims are controlled through PPB (Pharmacy and Poisons Board) as medical devices. Kenya does not apply an EU-style separate horizontal CE-equivalent regime for respirators such as RoHS battery or outdoor-noise law; controls are product-specific plus occupational safety oversight by DOSHS.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚监管范围由用途声明决定。用于职业防尘、颗粒物防护的过滤式呼吸器属于KEBS监管产品，按PVoC体系执行，并按采用EN 149的肯亚标准审评；具有患者感染控制或临床用途声称的医用、外科口罩则由PPB（药品与剧毒品局）按医疗器械管理。肯尼亚未对呼吸器设置欧盟式横向的CE同等制度（如RoHS、蓄电池或户外噪声法规）；控制主要是产品路径与DOSHS职业安全监督。
summary.zht: 肯亞監管範圍由用途聲明決定。用於職業防塵、顆粒物防護的過濾式呼吸器屬於KEBS監管產品，按PVoC體系執行，並按採用EN 149的肯亞標準審評；具有患者感染控制或臨床用途聲明的醫用、外科口罩則由PPB（藥品與劇毒品局）按醫療器械管理。肯亞未對呼吸器設置歐盟式橫向CE同等制度（如RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲法規）；控制主要是產品路徑與DOSHS職業安全監督。

standards_or_laws: KEBS PVoC to Standards Programme — scope by occupational PPE intent
Kenya Standard adopting EN 149 for filtering half masks
Pharmacy and Poisons Board (PPB) medical device regime for surgical / medical masks
Department of Occupational Safety and Health Services (DOSHS) workplace protective requirements

summary.en: China splits the same market-facing boundary into GB 2626 industrial respirators (SAMR and CCC) and GB 19083 medical-protective masks (NMPA medical-device pathway). Both are mandatory channels in China, but they are not substitutes for Kenya's KEBS/PPB split, and the standards naming differs.
summary.zh: 中国将用途边界分为工业防尘口罩（GB 2626，由SAMR和CCC管理）和医用防护口罩（GB 19083，由NMPA按医疗器械路径管理）。两类在中国均为强制性管理，但并不能替代肯尼亚的KEBS/PPB分流，且标准命名体系不同。
summary.zht: 中國將用途邊界分為工業防塵口罩（GB 2626，由SAMR和CCC管理）和醫用防護口罩（GB 19083，由NMPA按醫療器械路徑管理）。兩類在中國均為強制性管理，但不能替代肯亞的KEBS/PPB分流，且標準命名體系不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 19083-2010 — medical protective mask standard (NMPA medical device route)

gap.en: The main route choice must be made before shipping. Industrial KN95/GB 2626-positioned products must follow KEBS PVoC and DOSHS workplace obligations. Any mask with medical, surgical or clinical-function claims must instead be assessed through PPB medical-device controls. Dual-use claims can trigger both scrutiny paths and delay release.
gap.zh: 主要合规路径需在出货前确定。面向职业用途且按KN95/GB 2626定位的产品必须走KEBS PVoC并接受DOSHS职业安全约束。任何具有医疗、外科或临床功能声明的口罩须改走PPB医疗器械通道。双用途声称可能触发双路径审核并延误放行。
gap.zht: 主要合規路徑需在出貨前確定。面向職業用途且按KN95/GB 2626定位的產品必須走KEBS PVoC並接受DOSHS職業安全約束。任何具有醫療、外科或臨床功能聲明的口罩須改走PPB醫療器械通道。雙用途聲明可能觸發雙路徑審核並延誤放行。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — classification by intended use is decisive: KEBS PVoC and DOSHS for occupational respirators; PPB for medical/surgical masks
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 2626 for industrial and GB 19083 for medical-protective masks in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Classify for each model before export: KEBS PVoC is for occupational respirators and does not cover medical mask claims. Medical or surgical claims are handled through PPB controls, and no EU-style RoHS/battery/outdoor-noise regime replaces this pathway for this product type.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 每个型号都应在出口前完成分类：KEBS PVoC仅适用职业呼吸器，不能覆盖医用口罩用途。医用或外科用途声明应按PPB控制程序处理，本产品类型不存在可替代的欧盟式RoHS、蓄电池或户外噪声横向制度。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 每個型號都應在出口前完成分類：KEBS PVoC僅適用職業呼吸器，不能涵蓋醫用口罩用途。醫用或外科用途聲明應按PPB控制程序處理，本產品類型不存在可替代的歐盟式RoHS、電池或戶外噪音橫向制度。
